creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
This might be a dup of bug 234296, which is fixed by 12.0-p3.  Without a kernel dump it's not really possible to further investigate this panic, so I'll mark the bug a duplicate for now.  Please reopen it if the panic reoccurs on 12.0-p3.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 234296 ***
